# aggregate-kit

> Zero-dependency Domain-Driven Design building blocks for TypeScript: Result, Option, Entity, Aggregate, ValueObject, domain events and repository ports.

ESM-only TypeScript library. Node >= 24, zero runtime dependencies. Errors are values (`Result`/`Option`), the domain is pure, ownership is enforced at the repository port. Built with tsdown, tested with Vitest, linted with Biome, released with semantic-release.

## Public API

All exports come from the package root (`import { ... } from 'aggregate-kit'`).

Primitives:
- `Result<T, E = string>` — success/failure container: `ok`, `fail`, `combine`, `getValue`, `getError`, `isSuccess`, `isFailure`.
- `Option<T>`, `Some<T>`, `None<T>`, `match(option, { Some, None })` — explicit optional: `some`, `none`, `fromNullable`, `map`, `flatMap`, `filter`, `or`, `orElse`, `xor`, `inspect`, `unwrap`, `unwrapOr`, `unwrapOrElse`, `toUndefined`, `toNull`.
- `UUID<T extends string | number>`, `uuidv7()`, `randomUuidV4()` — typed identifier (defaults to UUID v7) and standalone generators.

Domain:
- `Entity<T>`, `IEntity<T>` — identity equality, `get(key)`, `toObject()`, `clone()`.
- `Aggregate<T>`, `IAggregate` — entity + events: `addEvent`, `addEvents`, `pullDomainEvents`, `clearEvents`, `hasEvents`, `getEventCount`, `domainEvents`.
- `ValueObject<T>` — immutable structural value; `static create()` validates via `validate()`.
- `BaseDomainEvent<T>`, `IDomainEvent<T>` — domain event base + interface.
- `WatchedList<T>` — tracks added/removed items vs an initial snapshot.

Application:
- `BaseRepository<T>`, `ScopedRepository<T, TScope>` — repository ports (reads → `Option`, all → `Result`).
- `RepoScope`, `RepoScopeKind`, `ScopeOf<K>` — `user` | `org` | `user-in-org` scopes, factories + guards.
- `PaginationParams`, `PaginatedResult<T>`, `createPaginatedResult`, `DEFAULT_PAGINATION`.
- `IUnitOfWork<TTx>` — transaction / unit-of-work port.
- `ErrorCode`, `ErrorSuffix`, `ErrorStatus`, `AppError`, `AppErrorException`, `httpStatusFromCode` — error taxonomy mapping suffix → HTTP status.
- `DatabaseOperationError`, `InputParseError`.

Events:
- `EventCollector` — AsyncLocalStorage request-scoped event buffer.
- `IEventDispatcher`, `InMemoryEventDispatcher`, `EventDispatcherLogger`, `EventHandlerFn`, `IEventHandler`.
- `onEvent`, `isEventHandler`, `EVENT_HANDLER_SYMBOL`, `EventHandler`, `OutOfContextLogger`.
- `domainEventToOutboxRow`, `OutboxRow`, `OutboxMappingScope`.

## Install

```
pnpm add aggregate-kit
```

## Quick Example

```typescript
import { Result, ValueObject } from 'aggregate-kit';

class Email extends ValueObject<string> {
  protected validate(value: string): Result<string> {
    return value.includes('@') ? Result.ok(value.toLowerCase()) : Result.fail('EMAIL_INVALID');
  }
}

const email = Email.create('Ada@Example.com'); // Result<Email>
```

## Documentation

- Full docs: https://github.com/axelhamil/aggregate-kit
- Detailed API: llms-full.txt
